problem: pnpm dev fails: tailwind v4 PostCSS plugin moved
solution: Install @tailwindcss/postcss and set postcss.config plugins to {'@tailwindcss/postcss': {}} instead of tailwindcss.

solution: Run git rebase -i HEAD~3, mark the lower two as 'squash', then force-push with --force-with-lease.
Add CORSMiddleware with allow_origins=['*'] for local dev only; restrict in production.
